confidence.explanation: All 8 ticket TCs pass: 5 API assertions (email+website present in all 4 endpoints + seed data verified) and 3 UI checks (dashboard card + folio header). UV-1/UV-2/UV-3 pass. -5 points: Invoice UI (Print Invoice disabled, no SO on any Totem booking) not fully exercised via UI; API-level folio/invoice assertions confirm data contract is correct.

test_cases.title: GET /location — email + website fields present
test_cases.note: GET /api/v1/location?bucket_id=2 → 200. location.email=info@totemlodge.com, location.website=www.totemlodge.com. All existing fields intact.

test_cases.title: GET /so/folio — location.email + location.website present
test_cases.note: GET /api/v1/so/folio?booking_id=1 → 200. location.email=info@totemlodge.com, location.website=www.totemlodge.com present at top-level location key.

test_cases.title: GET /so/invoice — location.email + location.website present
test_cases.note: GET /api/v1/so/invoice?booking_id=1 → 200. location.email=info@totemlodge.com, location.website=www.totemlodge.com present at top-level location key.

test_cases.title: Totem Lodge seed data — all contact fields correct
test_cases.note: All 9 seed fields match expected values: name, email, website, phone_number, mobile_number, address_line1, city, state_prov, postal_zip.

test_cases.title: Dashboard Location Info Card — email and website display
test_cases.note: Dashboard Overview tab shows Location Info card with email=info@totemlodge.com (mailto link) and website=www.totemlodge.com (https link). Rendered correctly from API data.

test_cases.title: Dashboard Location Info Card — phone number formatting
test_cases.note: Phone displays as '1 (800) 550-0178' (tel:18005500178) and Mobile as '(250) 624-6761' (tel:2506246761). Both correctly formatted per INV-662 spec.

test_cases.title: Folio header — all location fields from API, phone formatted
test_cases.note: Folio modal header shows: name=Totem Lodge, contact section=www.totemlodge.com info@totemlodge.com 1 (800) 550-0178 (250) 624-6761, addr=1335 Park Avenue, Prince Rupert, BC, CA, V8J 1K3. All from API payload, no hardcoded values.

test_cases.title: Console error scan
test_cases.note: 3 console errors found — all allowlisted: Cognito favicon 404 (third-party) and 2 QA probe calls with wrong bucket_id (not app-originated). Zero app-originated errors.

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All app-originated API requests returned 200. No non-2xx responses from the app itself.

test_cases.title: Broken asset scan
test_cases.note: No broken assets detected on pages visited.
